Print Layout Settings
Dynamic UPI QR configurations

Enable or disable dynamic payment UPI QR generation per document type.

Toggle QR Code display:
Conditional QR Display Rules:
If disabled, no QR code will be generated on Estimations and Delivery Challans regardless of their individual toggles, protecting internal operational documents.
Prefixes & Starting Series

Configure document prefixes and sequence number starters.

Document Type Prefix Next Serial Sequence No. Action
GST & Taxes settings

Toggle global GST operations, TCS controls, and tax rate lists.

Toggles to customize fields displayed in invoice summaries and calculations.

Transaction Customs & UI logic

Configure active pricing constraints, item table properties, and entry triggers.

Footer layouts & T&C

Standardized terms and conditions and signature text blocks printed in document footers.
